source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Quiet product English UI with softened display headings, readable sans body text, restrained numeric hierarchy, and Japanese typography guidance for calm labels, compact tables, and observation notes.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, slender-stem separators, bell-petal focus marks, moss-texture accents, bark-grain dividers, compact dashboards, and low-noise discovery navigation.

prompts.label: Transparent Bluebell motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Bluebell transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated bluebell carpet motif for a design-system catalog, no surrounding woodland scene, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact natural patch of spring woodland bluebells: many blue-violet bell-shaped flowers on slender green stems, narrow glossy leaves, mossy ground fragments, and a few small bark-brown leaf-litter pieces; accurate botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, natural petal translucency kept opaque enough for clean cutout, tactile moss and bark detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show an oval carpet-like cluster from a slightly elevated three-quarter view; do not crop any flowers or leaves.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves blue-violet bells, moss green stems, bark brown accents, and quiet spring woodland texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no insects, no animals, no full landscape, no sky, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Bluebell" / "Bluebell Carpet", derived from the bluebell carpet cutout already provided in context.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the bluebell motif image. The board must visibly respect blue-violet bell flowers, moss green leaves and moss, bark brown leaf litter, cool petal shadows, and quiet spring woodland discovery.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Bluebell", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use quiet product typography, readable sans UI, softened headings, and restrained numeric rhythm.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, calm operational dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, quiet discovery system rather than marketing page.
Color palette: blue-violet primary from bluebell bells, moss green support, bark brown structure, leaf green accents, misty woodland off-white surfaces, lichen grey borders, deep woodland ink. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Visual details: bell-petal scallop micro-shapes, slender-stem separators, soft moss texture, bark-grain dividers, small discovery markers, focused but subdued interactions.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Bluebell" / "Bluebell Carpet" design-system board, translated from the bluebell motif cutout and the light board already provided in context. It must feel like the same system in dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent bluebell carpet motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, typography, and the quiet discovery UI mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 design board, target 3840x2160 or 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide if the tool cannot output 3840; use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Bluebell", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; keep the same quiet product typography, readable sans UI, softened headings, and restrained numeric rhythm from the light board.
UI coverage: show buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, compact dashboard metrics, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error/success states, and token swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep woodland ink and bark shadow, blue-violet primary from bluebell petals, moss green support, bark brown structure, leaf green accents, misty lavender focus rings, lichen grey borders, subtle moss and bark texture overlays, bell-petal scallop markers, slender-stem separators.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, calm operational dashboard, 8px radius cards and controls, quiet discovery system rather than marketing page.
Text: short readable labels only; exact section labels may include Palette, Type, 日本語, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tables, Command, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no random brand names, no stock hero layout, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
